Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry to bother you like this... I just had a hard time focusing when I tried doing my homework alone...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Thank you for agreeing to study with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Koromaru says he'll study with us too. Right, boy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It must be tough for you guys having to think about tests at a time like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Wow... I guess that's why you're the leader, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I still wish this was just some dream that we're all going to wake up from soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I guess even you feel the pressure, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It makes me wonder... Should I really be doing homework at a time like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Huh!? You're actually enjoying this, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Even in the face of grave danger, you never give up. You fight back with all your might... Like a hero! That's so cool![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Still, the only thing we can do is carry on and complete our schoolwork as always.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}What's the matter, Koromaru? Hm...? He's got something in his mouth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Did you bring this here for us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Haha, thanks, Koromaru. I guess he's trying to cheer us up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I shouldn't make him worry so much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Okay, time to study! If I have any questions, can I ask you for help, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}And... done! That's it for my homework![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Oh, you're still studying, aren't you? Is it... okay if I stay here for a little while?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'll be sure not to bother you! Koromaru and I will be cheering you on. Good luck![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I continued studying with Amada[n]and Koromaru by my side...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Koromaru was with us the whole— Wait, what? Where did he go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Were you waiting for us to finish?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I guess it's our turn to hang out with him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Thanks for studying with me today. If you're okay with it, I'd like to do this again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}
